headlines.title: Fire’s Footprint on Santa Rosa Island
headlines.summary: A wildland fire charred grassland, coastal sage scrub, and chaparral across one-third of the island, the second largest of the Channel Islands.

headlines.title: NASA Awards Modification Contract for Reduced Gravity Test Aircraft
headlines.summary: NASA selected Denmar Technical Services of Nevada to provide aircraft modifications, maintenance, and testing services to the Human Spaceflight Mission Directorate at NASA’s Armstrong Flight Research Center in Edwards, C
